summary: v110 adds `boundedExactWeakEquivalenceToBoundedExactAcyclicHomotopy_trW`, `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparison`, `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparisonLocalizationIso`, `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparisonDirect`, `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparisonDirectLocalizationIso`, `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparisonDirectIso`, and `Dbounded.boundedVerdierComparison_comp_ambientIso`. The direct bounded localization now has an ordinary comparison to the bounded homotopy Verdier quotient, and composing that comparison with the bounded-to-ambient comparison recovers the existing ambient ordinary Verdier comparison. Product remains nonterminal because bounded/exact-acyclic closed2 is not unconditional, direct bounded left/right calculus and triangulated transfer to Dbounded are not proved, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
